name: vscode-agent-foundry
description: Bootstrap any repository for agentic software engineering with portable instructions, custom agents, reusable skills, and task handoffs.
author: Patrick Schäfer

viewsWelcome.contents:
Open a folder or workspace to use Agent Foundry.
[Open getting started guide](command:agentFoundry.openWalkthrough)
[Open market research](command:agentFoundry.openResearchNotes)

Run an analysis, generate portable repo instructions, and create handoffs for Copilot, Claude, Codex, and other coding agents.
[Analyze workspace](command:agentFoundry.analyzeWorkspace)
[Bootstrap assets](command:agentFoundry.bootstrapWorkspace)
[Generate task handoff](command:agentFoundry.generateTaskHandoff)
[Open getting started guide](command:agentFoundry.openWalkthrough)

walkthroughs.title: Get Started With Agent Foundry
walkthroughs.description: Analyze a repository, bootstrap agent workflow files, and create a portable task handoff.

steps.title: Analyze the workspace
steps.description: Inspect the current repository to detect stack, scripts, diagnostics, git status, and existing agent assets.

media.altText: Agent Foundry hero illustration showing repo analysis and generated workflow assets

steps.title: Bootstrap workflow assets
steps.description: Generate AGENTS.md, Copilot instructions, prompts, custom agents, and reusable skills into the repository.

media.altText: Agent Foundry walkthrough image showing generated repo assets and sidebar actions

steps.title: Create a task handoff
steps.description: Capture the current repository state into markdown that can be pasted into another agent session or shared with a teammate.

media.altText: Agent Foundry handoff preview showing repository context, diagnostics, and a continuation brief

agentFoundry.outputFolder.description: Workspace-relative folder where Agent Foundry stores reports and generated handoffs.

agentFoundry.includeClaudeAssets.description: Generate Claude-compatible repo assets alongside neutral and GitHub-oriented files.

agentFoundry.includeGitStatusInHandoff.description: Include current git status details in generated task handoffs when the workspace is a git repository.

agentFoundry.maxDiagnosticsInHandoff.description: Maximum number of workspace diagnostics to include in generated task handoffs.

agentFoundry.promptBeforeOverwrite.description: Ask for confirmation before overwriting existing generated workflow files.

agentFoundry.previewBeforeWrite.description: Show a generated-file preview before Agent Foundry writes workflow assets into the repository.
